claim_text: MEDRAG improves the accuracy of six different LLMs by up to 18% over chain-of-thought prompting
evidence_span: Overall, MEDRAG improves the accuracy of six different LLMs by up to 18% over chain-of-thought prompting, elevating the performance of GPT-3.5 and Mixtral to GPT-4level.

claim_text: Combination of various medical corpora and retrievers achieves the best performance
method: combination of various medical corpora and retrievers
evidence_span: Our results show that the combination of various medical corpora and retrievers achieves the best performance.

claim_text: Medical RAG exhibits log-linear scaling property and lost-in-the-middle effects
evidence_span: In addition, we discovered a log-linear scaling property and the "lostin-the-middle" effects in medical RAG.

claim_text: RAG system enables security-focused question answering with reduced risk of hallucinated responses
evidence_span: enabling security-focused question answering with reduced risk of hallucinated responses

claim_text: RAG pipeline grounds large language model outputs in authoritative security documentation
evidence_span: designed to ground large language model outputs in authoritative security documentation

claim_text: Retrieval-based prompt selection using semantically-similar examples outperforms random sampling for GPT-3 few-shot learning
task: table-to-text generation and open-domain question answering
evidence_span: significant gains are observed on tasks such as table-to-text generation (41.9% on the ToTTo dataset) and open-domain question answering (45.5% on the NQ dataset)

claim_text: Sentence encoders fine-tuned on task-related datasets yield more helpful retrieval results for in-context example selection
evidence_span: the sentence encoders fine-tuned on task-related datasets yield even more helpful retrieval results

claim_text: LLMs achieve best results around 75% accuracy for English medical QA, with accuracy dropping 10 points for languages other than English
evidence_span: performance of LLMs, with best results around 75 accuracy for English, still has large room for improvement, especially for languages other than English, for which accuracy drops 10 points

claim_text: State-of-the-art RAG methods demonstrate difficulty in obtaining and integrating readily available medical knowledge to positively impact Medical Question Answering results
evidence_span: despite using state-of-the-art RAG methods, our results also demonstrate the difficulty of obtaining and integrating readily available medical knowledge that may positively impact results on downstream evaluations for Medical Question Answering
